# Hey Nova

> Hey Nova is a Canadian, women-led digital agency specializing in inclusive,
> accessible web design and development for nonprofits, public sector, and
> mission-driven organizations. We build with Next.js and headless CMSs
> (Prismic), and we are WCAG 2.2, AODA, and Accessible Canada Act (ACA)
> focused. IAAP and WBE Canada certified.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://heynova.io/en-ca): Overview of services, approach, and
  recent work.
- [Services](https://heynova.io/en-ca/services): Accessibility audits and
  remediation, inclusive web design, headless CMS development, digital
  strategy, and ongoing care.
- [Insights](https://heynova.io/en-ca/insights): Articles on accessibility,
  inclusive design, nonprofit web strategy, and headless CMS implementation.
- [Team](https://heynova.io/en-ca/team): Meet the people behind Hey Nova.
- [Contact](https://heynova.io/en-ca/contact): Get in touch about a project.

## Languages

The site is published in English (en-ca) and French (fr-ca). Replace
`/en-ca/` with `/fr-ca/` for French equivalents.

## Sitemap

- [XML sitemap](https://heynova.io/sitemap.xml)
